# kopsutils_oci_reference (Data Source)

Resolves an OCI image reference to an immutable, digest-pinned reference by querying the registry (the same way kОps pins images: crane.Digest with the default keychain). For multi-arch images, the digest is that of the per-platform child manifest selected from the index.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Resolve an OCI image to a digest-pinned reference (queries the registry, the
# same way kОps pins images). For multi-arch images the digest is the
# platform-specific child manifest when a platform is given.
data "kopsutils_oci_reference" "kops_controller" {
  image    = "registry.k8s.io/kops/kops-controller"
  tag      = "1.35.1"
  platform = "linux/arm64/v8"
}

output "kops_controller_reference" {
  # -> registry.k8s.io/kops/kops-controller:1.35.1@sha256:...
  value = data.kopsutils_oci_reference.kops_controller.reference
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `image` (String) The image repository without tag or digest (e.g. registry.k8s.io/kops/kops-controller).
- `tag` (String) The image tag (e.g. 1.35.1).

### Optional

- `platform` (String) Target platform as os/arch[/variant] (e.g. linux/arm64/v8). If omitted, the top-level manifest digest is returned (the multi-arch index digest for multi-arch images), matching kОps' image pinning.

### Read-Only

- `digest` (String) The resolved manifest digest (e.g. sha256:fb5c...). With no platform this is the top-level/index digest; with a platform it is the platform-specific child manifest digest.
- `reference` (String) The fully-pinned reference: image:tag@digest (e.g. registry.k8s.io/kops/kops-controller:1.35.1@sha256:434b...).
